star_1.text: Fresh Gameplay - Ruined by excessive ads With almost every mobile game just a remix of another game, this felt new and fresh to me, or at least I've never played a game like it before. the concept and gameplay is casual fun but the sheer number of ads totally ruins this game. I don't mind ads for free games, I get it the devs would like to make something. however this is a point where a minute of game play results in a minute or more of ads is just too much. Game uninstalled. Shame

guys putting ads to support development is understandable but when the player spends more time watching ads then playing it becomes a problem being reasonable with ads makes you money in the long run but if you want a quick cash grab then sure keep on going the direction you currently are but know that you will lose all of the player base in a matter of weeks.

i get it , you make money from ads. however ur doing it a bit too much ingameplay a part of the screen is with an ad banner after the game is done another ad really? can u not do it less. i downloaded it to play on a plane and i am really dissapointed that it even needs internet connection which i dont get for what? to load ads to my device? trash , fix it then this rating changes

this isn't a game it's just an advert for other games smh. It bombards you with ads for everything from in game play to just remaining idle and it's incredibly slow in terms of response time of the controls. The devs should be absolutely shamed for this trash, you make a game that is just a promotion for other and quite frankly better looking games

First of all, very good game, good concept, exciting parkour and the "prince of persia Rewind", just the cherry on top. But the ADS, RUIN THE ENTIRE EXPERINECE, THE ADS, MAKE THIS GAME UNPLAYABLE, BECAUSE IT'S UNBEARABLE.

can't get into the game properly because after 30 minutes playing the game I have watched 28 minutes of ads, you do a round that takes 5 secs to finish then there is an ad then another round for a secs then more ads. deleting it to never be installed again
slow and laggy , requires internet and not available in Syria. worst game ever. I've never been banned from a game because of my country. EVER. but the 1 star is for performance not for the ban

The game would be fun....If you could play it. Sooooo many adds before a stage, during a stage and after a stage....sooo damn annoying when you can't even actually play the game.. the adds take over and ruin any enjoyment i started to have...
played for 5 minutes, watched about 10 ads within that time frame. I get needing ads for money to continue to build but this is very excessive, cool concept but I uninstalled.

hello admin had a designed the game is good but coming to ads your getting more money on that such a waste of time if your are real game maker just remove all such a waste of time for one level it's taking 3 ads time of 2mins if u want any doughts on that really ping to my mail I will reply don't to do all the ads for your sake of money admin I'm telling to you only ok you had understood just reply me ok
You spend more time watching ads than playing the game. it would be a good game if you could play a couple levels between ads but you do one thing you get an ad, just an awful money grab
really funny concept. enjoyed myself for the first 5 minutes. then got ads shoved shoved down my throat. it was a if the game devs decided to use my mouth as their own personal toilet.

i saw the ad, installed the game, played 1 very short round, had to watch 3 ads, played a second short round, and watched 3 ads. started bank robbery mission, passed the guard, another ad popped up, exited the game, went app info and uninstalled the game. it's trash overall. ps. it's not even playable, so how are you going to make money with ads if one doesn't even play your game???

whats the point of having money in later levels if there's no cosmetics to buy because they can only be unlocked with ads, basically in later levels money is useless and gets u nowhere even the world building is very small and finishes quite fast, so im pretty much disappointed since im just repeating everything over and over again.

Could have been a good game! The idea is good, the motion of the character is fun, but graphics could have been better and OMG! THE ADDS! You waste more time on ads then playing, what the hell??? All the games devs live from that, we understand, but playing 15-20 seconds to pass a level and then spend 30 sec for watching the ads, and then watching another add before starting next level, is just outrageous! I would have given the game 3 stars for the concept and engine. Waste of time!
if u want want every 10 second mission to hit u with a 30 second add, than this is the game for you!! ps: game sucks by itself
more time spent in ads, even if you skip them, than actually playing the game.

the gamesy be fun however I don't believe it would be possible to put more ad's in. one ad playing every 2nd or 3rd move or 10 seconds it seems. it's currently unplayable with the greed of the developers inserting the ad's so often.

Too much game in my ad generator. And before you thank me for my feedback, don't. People have been complaining about it since 2023 and you've yet to actually accept a single feedback. Be honest about your ad-gluttony and stop pretending that this is a game. No, my feedback is not important. Many others have left the same feedback for over 2 years. None of that's important to you guys.

never before has a game been more disrespectful of my time. I'm not even kidding when I say at least 50% of the time this app is open. it's running an ad and you're not even getting anything for it. it's truly insulting. they must be buying reviews in order for this to be above four stars. it's truly an abysmal experience. I'm going to go through the comments and report the ones that I suspect are AI. hopefully Google will take action and take down this scam of a game.

star_2.text: game is fun but waaaay too many ads, some games have just a few, some have an average amount, this one is almost unplayable. I don't think I play more than 20 seconds before seing another ad, which is 15 seconds, then 5 seconds after pressing the first x, then 5 more seconds after the second x, then finally on the 3rd x you can get back to playing, but only for 20 seconds, 30 if your real lucky

It's a great concept.... and I'm sure people would enjoy more games with these mechanics........... but... there's a long ad after every single level, and the levels are about 20 seconds long. I like apps that I can play more than I watch.

There's an ad every 2nd level, and the levels are really short, I wouldn't recommend unless you like watching ads. I get you need to make money for updates and improvements but calm down on the ads please

Fun game, really cool concept, however in 5 minutes of playing you get probably around 3 to 3.5 minutes of ads. I understand needed to fund your game somehow, but that feels overkill and I've uninstalled.

not even 10 seconds into the game. Ads were thrown at my face all the time . One of the horrible experiences. even though the game is good, the amount of ads are surreal . each ad is about a min. download the game and uninstall it within 15 mins . just the amount of frustration I faced with so many ads .
I never even got to play the game because there were so many ads I gave up. Do something about the ads and I will reinstall it

depends on what you want from an app game. I'm more of a time waster, not an avid gamer. As a gamer, its ok and maybe you can put up with the ads. But 7 seconds of game play followed by 20 seconds of ads isn't how I want to waste time. These non challenging, quick stage games aren't for me.

Has a lot of potential, but is very repetitive, as are the ads. There's an ad after every level, which obviously can be an annoyance when trying to enjoy a game, the amount of money these companies make from ads, and with how many downloads they get, they can afford to limit ads like a lot of the decent games out there. Hopeful things change someday!

From what I gather looking at the reviews, people loved this game and there were no intrusive ads or ads after every level. These kinds of reviews started in 2023. There are ads after every level now and even if you say you want to skip it and lose the reward, you still get an unskippable ad. And the game is pretty easy, at least at first, so be prepared to watch a lot of ads. The only reason i didn't give it one star is because the idea is fun.

This game is fun to play,it has a nice touch on the slow motion right before you are about to strike. I would give this game 5 stars ,but the problem of this game is containing too many ads 😡😡. I mean it is okay to advertise here and there but when it comes to this game it advertise after each level,it advertise so often ,it advertises like every 10 seconds you play the game ,you can't even enjoy the game .😒

ADS ADS ADS! Do you like ads? Than this game is for you! I like this game, but the constant ads need to be taken down a notch in my opinion. The game is really addictive and fun, but the ads. This game shows a great example of the virsion I saw while looking through the list, it has everything that they put in the ads for it. But overall it's a good game.

I love this stupid game since it's a good way to pass the time. However taking down 3 enemies, get a video to continue the story, then have to play another video just to fight the boss is honestly repetitive and annoying. I wouldn't recommend this for anyone. I understand games with ads but this had an ad with some gaming in it.

Game might be good, I'll never know tho. I'm trying to find fun games to play offline, but it's literally impossible to play this game offline. After completing the tutorial a message popped up saying no Internet connection and it won't let me click off or do anything. I tried closing it and reopening the game, but I keep getting hit with that same message.
the game is so damn great but the ads overshadow it. ADS 95% GAME TIME 5%

Little realistic, the movement isn't really controlled by the user, the character is going to do whatever is programmed to do. You always win, one way or another, on a second chance or whatever... It starts with just 1 ad after you finish a level and then there's ads in between levels, it's just an ad profit machine making. Simple game, which would be OK if it didn't have so many ads. Also, fells like inciting violence... There's a review saying that it's to learn martial arts... What a BS! 🤦

seems like a nice game, but after trying it for a few minutes out of which the vast majority was watching ads, i uninstalled. if you want to make your players spend more time watching ads than playing - fine, but give them at least a few minutes' grace to try the game.
cool game but a advert in literally every 20 seconds! another game destroyed by greed

Game had potential to be fun. But a 1minute unskippable ad everytime I complete a 15 second level?? No, thank you. Can't even play it offline. I actually don't mind the ads for games, but not this much. Just tone it down on that part. I'm putting 2 stars because if not for the ads, the gameplay is actually good

Not a bad game to pass time and relax but ads are just killing the game and j don't understand why it needs a internet connection as it isn't a game that really needs power up or ads to win and clear levels ,I installed and un-installed the same day ,I enjoyed the game play but ads are a bit too much.

This game is slow (no pun intended) it lags and has way too many ads. You watch more ads yhan uou play runs. The short i saw on YouTube made me download this game but it did not live up to the expectations. Even if you press "no thanks" it gives you an ad anyway.

star_3.text: I want to like this game. It's fun and silly. I just can't quite get there yet. It's got potential but I found the levels repetitive and boring after playing for about 15 minutes. I feel like ads break up and add length to what is a very short and repetitive game. Maybe once the creator adds more content it could be more fun, and worth paying to drop ads, but for now, I'll bench it.

This was my experience. I liked getting through all the missions and then at a certain point it just starts to repeat itself. For me I just kept on playing until there was too much repetition. I can't tell you what it was for me each round that kept me playing. Maybe punching all the bad guys around and how you get to control most everything and it's simple and made me addicted probably longer than others.
it would be a great game if there weren't a forced ad for every 2 people you attack. why do I have to watch an ad to fight the boss?

I like the overall concept of this game and the gameplay works well in many areas, but they should focus on what's fun. Like fighting, storyline missions, the parkour and tagging element's, running from and or chasing cops and badguys. Less on annoying obstacles, also my game constantly crashes on average every 2 to five minutes which is ridiculousl. I only kept playing because I believe there's a lot of potential here.

This game is not as good as I suspected it would be. Literally after every level, even if you click no thanks, they give you ads. And these ads arent just 2-5 seconds long. They're 10 seconds long. Dont get me wrong, over all the game idea is very fun to play but the animation also needs some work. I know this because I, myself, am an animator. The frames per a second lag sometimes and run very slow. Also, when you continue a story, they give you a 50 second long ad for the reward. Pls fix this

this game has a lot of potential. My first problem that lots of games have is too much ads. there's an ad after every level. Second and final complaint is that the levels are kinda bland except for the zombie attack one. make the main levels more detailed(like youre running through a city) and have less ads and this game might be the best single player game I've played

"Everything is fine, graphics, controls, everything😊, but there is a very big issue in this game that it forces you to keep the data connection on, which is not necessary for the game... And if you keep it on, a lot of advertisements run without any reason.. which is very annoying.. And that's why I only giving it 3 stars." 🤷‍♂️

The game itself is enjoyable, but it’s overloaded with ads. The ads are relentless, and it feels like the developers rely heavily on them for revenue. Ads pop up even during gameplay, and since the game is online-only, you can’t avoid them by playing offline. I’d love to see an offline version so players wouldn’t have to deal with constant ads. While I like the game, the nonstop ads completely killed my interest, and I ended up uninstalling it after just 60 minutes. I’m giving it 3 stars instead

Though there is something nice and pleasant at the game doesn't deserve even 3 stars. When you have a game with good mechanics, a lot to do, smoot action do not put 20-30 seconds adds every ~30 seconds. This game should not require Internet access as there is nothing at it - it is a single player, BUT advertising videos appear to be the main bloody feature. Shame on you.

Same with other replies. The game's concept is most definitely fun, but the amount of ads most definitely ruins the experience. Ads come after every level. Stories required a 30-second ad each time just to complete it. And to progress or start a story, it costs in-game cash

star_4.text: It's really fun, but it's got it own issues. It's got fluid animation, smooth motion, awesome levels, and obviously it's pretty fun. Perfect for those long times without anything to do. But, I do have some problems. To start, in the ads, it showed a smooth graphic color correction, with some really cool shaders. Though the game delivers and is fine without that, it'd still be nice (just a suggestion.) But my main issue, way too many ads. After everything. Overall a good game. Needs some work.

In my opinion this game is do interesting and fun, not like the other mobile games but there is 1 major thing that is keeping it away from 5 stars. The ads, i think you should lower the ads because every stage i get one and it's starting to annoy me.

Game is the exact same as the ads, really creative gameplay and usage of Ragdolls. However one small problem is levels tend to repeat only after 5 levels sometimes and the irritating amount of ads. Overall I would recommend for a stress reliever

star_5.text: The ads i saw for this game were enough to make me think about downloading it, but after seeing the game has so much more than what meets the eye, it was evident this was something i wanted to 100%. There's a hub of activities to play, different story quests, as well as the main arcade beat-em-up/platforming levels. This is totally worth downloading!!!! Some aspects are a little goofy, and the humor is ridiculously over the top, but that's the kind i love. 5 stars well earned

Fight people in slow motion Fun running game where you drag the character to advance through obstacles Run and drag the limbs to hit, kick and punch the enemies in this unique fast paced runner. Draw your custom fighting pose to attack, dodge bullets, shoot guns and engage in variety of fighting combat. This game features many fighting styles such as boxing, karate, judo, kung fu, jiu jitsu, spider fighting and much more. Channel your inner ninja and fight people in variety of ways such as one

Exept for a few glitches this funny game is great its a no wifi game i havent seen what its like with wifi on bc i play without wifi so i dont know if there are too many adds but otherwise a good game :) especially those who want a easy game. Five stars. The graphics are not bad, definetely could improve a lot in the future. The ads does not disrupt the game. The game is fun in its own way. Not a challenging game but if you want to pass time, like waiting at a line, you can play this game.

This game changed my perspective of life. When I was younger I was very depressed and I didn't know what I wanted to do full time. Slow mo run saved me. If you are under 75 years old play this game it will change your life. If you are older than 75 you should be dead by now
